## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce Nick McGonegal as the new growth marketing lead at Homebase and align on content strategy and SEO initiatives with GrowthX Labs team.](https://fathom.video/share/9rK54KNJHEyp3epncvtGbfWps3xztyzN?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Nick brings analytical/performance marketing expertise; seeks to develop content/SEO skills](https://fathom.video/share/9rK54KNJHEyp3epncvtGbfWps3xztyzN?tab=summary&timestamp=75.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide more detailed reporting on content performance and ICP traffic quality](https://fathom.video/share/9rK54KNJHEyp3epncvtGbfWps3xztyzN?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Team exploring programmatic SEO opportunities (e.g. glossary pages) aligned with product roadmap](https://fathom.video/share/9rK54KNJHEyp3epncvtGbfWps3xztyzN?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
  - [Discussing potential implementation of data enrichment tools (e.g. Clay) for lead nurturing in 2025](https://fathom.video/share/9rK54KNJHEyp3epncvtGbfWps3xztyzN?tab=summary&timestamp=1366.0)
  - [Investigating Webflow form integration with Iterable for improved lead capture capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/9rK54KNJHEyp3epncvtGbfWps3xztyzN?tab=summary&timestamp=1807.0)

## Topics

### Team Introductions and Roles

  - [Nick McGonegal: New growth marketing lead at Homebase, bringing analytical/finance background](https://fathom.video/share/9rK54KNJHEyp3epncvtGbfWps3xztyzN?tab=summary&timestamp=75.0)
  - [Bisera Stankovska: GrowthX account manager, ensuring content quality and scaling production](https://fathom.video/share/9rK54KNJHEyp3epncvtGbfWps3xztyzN?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Prateek Gupta: SEO expert supporting Bisera and Jimmy](https://fathom.video/share/9rK54KNJHEyp3epncvtGbfWps3xztyzN?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
  - [Jimmy Pal: Shifting to advisory role, focusing on metrics and SEO strategy](https://fathom.video/share/9rK54KNJHEyp3epncvtGbfWps3xztyzN?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)
  - [Sadira Sittampalam: Former lead on Homebase account, now supporting Bisera](https://fathom.video/share/9rK54KNJHEyp3epncvtGbfWps3xztyzN?tab=summary&timestamp=2529.0)
  - [Kerry McCreadie: Homebase's internal liaison, now reporting directly to CMO](https://fathom.video/share/9rK54KNJHEyp3epncvtGbfWps3xztyzN?tab=summary&timestamp=1298.0)

### Content Strategy and Reporting

  - [GrowthX producing 10 new articles + 5 refreshes weekly](https://fathom.video/share/9rK54KNJHEyp3epncvtGbfWps3xztyzN?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)
  - [Shifting to more detailed performance reporting (clicks, impressions, ICP quality)](https://fathom.video/share/9rK54KNJHEyp3epncvtGbfWps3xztyzN?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Exploring programmatic SEO opportunities (e.g. glossary pages) aligned with product roadmap](https://fathom.video/share/9rK54KNJHEyp3epncvtGbfWps3xztyzN?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
  - [Considering bulk approvals for content clusters to increase production efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/9rK54KNJHEyp3epncvtGbfWps3xztyzN?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)

### Product Updates and Content Alignment

  - [Homebase launching new products: tip management, task management, background checks](https://fathom.video/share/9rK54KNJHEyp3epncvtGbfWps3xztyzN?tab=summary&timestamp=1236.0)
  - [Focusing on payroll and mobile-friendly content for upcoming year](https://fathom.video/share/9rK54KNJHEyp3epncvtGbfWps3xztyzN?tab=summary&timestamp=1236.0)
  - [Kerry to facilitate quarterly cross-departmental calls for aligned content priorities](https://fathom.video/share/9rK54KNJHEyp3epncvtGbfWps3xztyzN?tab=summary&timestamp=1298.0)

### Data Enrichment and Lead Nurturing

  - [Discussed potential implementation of Clay or similar tool for data enrichment](https://fathom.video/share/9rK54KNJHEyp3epncvtGbfWps3xztyzN?tab=summary&timestamp=1366.0)
  - [Homebase lacks pre-signup nurture sequences; opportunity for improved visibility](https://fathom.video/share/9rK54KNJHEyp3epncvtGbfWps3xztyzN?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [Implementation likely pushed to 2025 due to current infrastructure limitations](https://fathom.video/share/9rK54KNJHEyp3epncvtGbfWps3xztyzN?tab=summary&timestamp=1834.0)
  - [Challenges with data availability for local SMB customers noted](https://fathom.video/share/9rK54KNJHEyp3epncvtGbfWps3xztyzN?tab=summary&timestamp=1920.0)

### CRO and Lead Capture

  - [Exploring Webflow form integration with Iterable for improved lead capture](https://fathom.video/share/9rK54KNJHEyp3epncvtGbfWps3xztyzN?tab=summary&timestamp=1807.0)
  - [Potential for embedding AI-powered calculators or chatbots on specific pages](https://fathom.video/share/9rK54KNJHEyp3epncvtGbfWps3xztyzN?tab=summary&timestamp=2329.0)
  - [Jimmy to share insights on Webflow form setup with Kerry and Phil S (website lead)](https://fathom.video/share/9rK54KNJHEyp3epncvtGbfWps3xztyzN?tab=summary&timestamp=2157.0)
